content.problemStatement:
You are given 222 integers NNN and MMM, and 222 arrays AAA and BBB.

Define f(X)f(X)f(X) as follows:


Start with Y=XY = XY=X.
For each i=1,2,…,Ni = 1, 2, \ldots, Ni=1,2,…,N in this order: Update Y=max⁡(Y+Bi,Ai)Y = \max(Y + B_i, A_i)Y=max(Y+Bi​,Ai​)
f(X)f(X)f(X) is the final value of YYY.
Find ∑i=1Mf(i)\sum_{i = 1}^{M} f(i)∑i=1M​f(i), i.e. f(1)+f(2)+…+f(M).f(1) + f(2) + \ldots + f(M).f(1)+f(2)+…+f(M).


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line contains 222 integers NNN and MMM.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
The third line contains NNN integers - B1,B2,…,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1​,B2​,…,BN​.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the answer.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2⋅1052 \cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : We describe how each of the values of f(i)f(i)f(i) is found.


X=1X = 1X=1 : Start with Y=1Y = 1Y=1. For i=1i = 1i=1, YYY updated to max⁡(1+1,3)=3\max(1 + 1, 3) = 3max(1+1,3)=3. For i=2i = 2i=2, YYY updated to max⁡(3+2,4)=5\max(3 + 2, 4) = 5max(3+2,4)=5. Hence, f(1)=5f(1) = 5f(1)=5.


X=2X = 2X=2 : Start with Y=2Y = 2Y=2. For i=1i = 1i=1, YYY updated to max⁡(2+1,3)=3\max(2 + 1, 3) = 3max(2+1,3)=3. For i=2i = 2i=2, YYY updated to max⁡(3+2,4)=5\max(3 + 2, 4) = 5max(3+2,4)=5. Hence f(2)=5f(2) = 5f(2)=5.


X=3X = 3X=3 : Start with Y=3Y = 3Y=3. For i=1i = 1i=1, YYY updated to max⁡(3+1,3)=4\max(3 + 1, 3) = 4max(3+1,3)=4. For i=2i = 2i=2, YYY updated to max⁡(4+2,4)=6\max(4 + 2, 4) = 6max(4+2,4)=6. Hence f(3)=6f(3) = 6f(3)=6.


Thus, the sum is 5+5+6=165 + 5 + 6 = 165+5+6=16.
